evaluation.summary: The data suggest that the exponential decay rate λ derived from primorial scaling is not stable across k, indicating the need for further validation.
next_directions: Extend the analysis to higher primorial indices with arbitrary-precision arithmetic to assess convergence stability.
Compare the observed λ estimates with theoretical predictions from LDAB error analysis to identify systematic deviations.
Explore alternative scaling functions beyond primorial to test robustness of the exponential decay hypothesis.
